title: Lyellfe Set of 3 Acrylic Apothecary Jars, Vanity Organizer Canister with Airtight Lids, Bathroom Qtip Holder, Clear Storage Jar for Candy, Bath Salt, Cotton Ball, Cotton Swab, 34 oz, 25 oz, 17 oz
description:
About this item
Package Info: You will receive 3 pack acrylic apothecary jars in different size, hold 34 oz, 25 oz and 17 oz, offering more choices for your goods storage.
Premium Material: Made of quality acrylic, BPA-free, lightweight, sturdier than glass, not easy to break and sure to store dry foods, serve you for longer time.
Functional Lids: Our clear storage containers are designed with leak-proof lids and airtight silicone ring, double protections to keep goods dry and fresh. There is a small dot at the top of the lid, which helps open and close freely.
Clear and Simple Look: Display your items in stylish and organized way. With the high transparency of containers, you can easily tracking what you want and knowing when you need to replenish certain products.
Multiple Uses: Lyellfe canister set can not only store cotton swabs, Q-tips, cotton balls, cosmetic pads, floss, bath salt and more in bathroom, but also hold candy, sugar, scented tea and other kitchen accessories at counter.
reviews_5s:
I am using these in our bathroom to hold Epsom salts, q tips, and flossers. They are acrylic which is great for having kids around and not wanting glass to break. They are lightweight but chunky enough that they look really nice and are sturdy. I’m really impressed with these canisters!Light weight! They look great in my daughters bathroom.Play Video
These are great for what I needed. They ended up being smaller than what I would have liked but I decided to keep them. The lid fits tightly to the jar and I like that it isn’t glass. Great for organization!I don't think these are leakproof but the do have seals in the lids. I used them in my bathroom to display bath salts and such. Arrived in perfect condition, no scratches or anything.These little jars are perfect! They hold plenty of Q-tips, etc. And they are light weight, so they are easy to move around. And above all else they are pretty to look at.I absolutely love these jars! I have them in my bathroom, I have Q-Tips, cotton balls and other bathroom items in them, they're waterproof it's just a greatEven though these containers are plastic they still look great and seal well. I was very pleased with how much they hold and how they look.Erfüllt den ZweckPerfect for my needs. Look great and the size of the neck makes it easy to fill and retrieve the contents.
reviews_1s: The first set arrived, broken the second set also arrived broken
